author: ycnmhd
description: A writing interface that combines structure and content. Inspired by Gingko Writer.

manifest.author: ycnmhd
manifest.description: Edit Markdown in a keyboard-centric Miller columns interface. Inspired by Gingko Writer.
manifest.name: Lineage

name: Lineage

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bug fixes
- View fails to load in Obsidian 1.9.10

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.8.4...0.8.5

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: # Bug fixes - (links) block and heading links don't work as expected - (view) inactive views of a file trigger `document-reload` when another active view of the same file is saved - (ribbon) toggling a pinned view creates a new empty leaf - (dnd) dropping external text while editing adds the text twice - (minimap) `single-char` elements break `double-tag` elements - (minimap) space after `tag` should reset element type - (minimap) minimap scrolls to the bottom on mount - (minimap) canvas height not updated after document height change - (hotkeys) `create-card-after-parent` places the card at the end of the group - (hotkeys) root cards of pasted branches are selected in reverse, which affects immediate moving actions - (zoom) `vim-cursor` workaround affects sidebar cards - (zoom) `fit-branch` includes sidebar cards in measurements - (html-elements-format) replace `` with `` to avoid issues with Obsidian links parser - (html-elements-format) `span` element is rendered in link previews # Improvements - (search) add the ability to copy/cut search results - (card context-menu) add `sort subsections` action - (view context-menu) add `eject document` action - (settings) add `default link behavior` setting - (settings) add `headings font size` setting - (hotkeys) add `select all sections` hotkey - (hotkeys) allow deleting/cutting all cards - (rules) add `global rules` - (rules) add the ability to duplicate rules - (rules) add `self-or-*` targets # Changes - (toolbar) move `history` buttons to top left corner, move `zoom` buttons to the bottom right corner - (lang) use `section` instead of `card` - (settings) use vertical tabs instead of a flat list - (hotkeys) replace `undo`/`redo` hotkeys with `mod+z` /`mod+shift+z` - (cards) remove `has-children` indicator - (card context-menu) replace `export column` action with `export selection` **Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.8.3...0.8.4

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bug fixes
- (minimap) the plugin throws an error on active leaf change

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.8.2...0.8.3

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Bug fixes
- (editor) editor commands stopped working in obsidian 1.8.4
- (links) open internal link in right split does not focus new leaf in obsidian 1.8.4
- (html-elements) callouts don't render correctly in markdown view
- (zoom) can't reset zoom initially
- (outline) active card not revealed when selected using search or history
- (hotkeys) split at cursor right should place cursor at the start
- (dnd) dropping external text right places it at the start of the group
- (selection) selected card not cleared when a different card is selected
- (sidebar) copy link to block uses main active card id
- (minimap) scrollbar of inactive views is not initialized correctly
- (minimap) empty document not cleared correctly

# Improvements
- (hotkeys) add create card left (after parent) hotkey

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.8.1...0.8.2

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Improvements
- (toolbar) add the ability to hide toolbar buttons

# Bug fixes
- (sidebar) can't scroll cards list
- (sidebar) can't copy active sidebar card
- (minimap) minimap is blank when the document is too large #80
- (align-branch) misc scrolling issues
- (settings) modal height not limited to view height
- (hotkeys) search returns empty groups in outline mode

# Changes
- `shift + double click` to center the active branch instead of `double click`

---

* Next by @ycnmhd in https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/pull/81
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.8.0...0.8.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# New
- Outline mode
- Rule-based border and background colors
- Lazy vertical scrolling mode

# Improvements
- (editor) Maintain edit mode when selecting a different card
- (editor) Place the cursor at the click position when enabling edit mode
- (editor) Remember cursor position
- (card buttons) Add the option to show card buttons on inactive cards
- (dnd) Improve auto-scroll edge detection
- (theme) Add the ability to set active branch text color
- (theme) Add the ability to set inactive cards opacity 
- (hotkeys) Add the ability to delete hotkeys
- (hotkeys) Add the ability to customize editor-state condition
- (hotkeys) Add a menu to reset hotkeys and load presets
- (hotkeys) Make delete card confirmable
- (hotkeys) Select pasted cards
- (hotkeys) Allow moving cards up/down to parents that have no child cards
- (hotkeys) New hotkey: toggle vertical scrolling mode
- (hotkeys) New hotkey: zoom in/zoom out
- (hotkeys) New hotkey: select parent card (useful in outline mode)
- (hotkeys) New hotkey: toggle outline mode
- (history) Select the affected card when undoing a change
- (settings) Disable reset buttons dynamically
- (search) Hide minimap if a search opened it
- (minimap) Highlight comma
- (editor) Save on container click
- (align-branch) Align active branch on container double click
- (status bar) Show the number of total child cards
- (zoom) Hold shift to undo reset
- (zoom) Fit branch option


# Bug fixes
- The left border of the active card causes a layout shift
- (preview) Card not updated when a checkbox is unchecked
- (search) Search overrides active card when the document is updated
- (preview) Adding nbsp prevents tables from rendering correctly
- (align-branch) Active card of the group not updated after a structural change
- (zoom) Vim cursor position when zoomed out
- (zoom) Fix popup position when minimap is open
- web workers not terminated on plugin unload

# Changes
- (hotkeys) Moving cards right is now limited to the card group 
- (hotkeys) Split-at-cursor places the new card at the start of the group

--- 

* next by @ycnmhd in https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/pull/76
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.7.1-beta...0.8.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: fix: plugin affects icons in light theme #77 673a2f6

- split-cards should ignore code blocks  19bbd1f

- remove-stale-documents timeout not cleared on unload 4a486a3

- align-branch effect throws when no card is rendered 2ac250e

## New contributors

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* next by @ycnmhd in https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/pull/39
# Improvements
- c673d63 (experimental) support outlines as an alternative format #26 
	- default format can be set in settings
	- file format can be switched from the view context menu
- 5176222 select multiple cards using `shift + navigation keys`
- e0194d4 remember active card
- 61e570f navigate to card when a block-id link is clicked
- 082962f a card context-menu item to copy link to block
- 8c69405 preview card content before splitting
- 297cfd3 correct headings before splitting
- 2024bb7 maintain root heading level when splitting
- af36d0b maintain active card when file is modified externally
- 6dd6f09 maintain editing state when moving a card
- c661d43 add a file context-menu item to import from gingko #42
- 66a1bf4 add a card context-menu item to export column #43
- ca84e9f add card-scrolling hotkeys
- e168c23 add card-navigation hotkeys
- 73844c3 make branch aligning slightly faster
- e3301d1 mark unresolved links in preview mode
# Bug fixes
- c856fce document not reloaded when frontmatter is updated externally
- a75298a fit document into view #36
- 94a13a2 sometimes dropping a card results in scrolling it to bottom-right corner
# Changes
- 45a766c move some commands to view context menu
- b3afde4 move 'open in editor' button to ribbon

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/ycnmhd/obsidian-lineage/compare/0.5.4...0.6.0
